query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE parentId IS NULL) as top_level_cats,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE parentId IS NOT NULL) as sub_cats,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE categoryId IS NULL) as products_no_category,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE categoryId IS NOT NULL) as products_with_category,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products) as total_products;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xomvQyHT3Pc2eM.33c921a427fa --database 6qKkSV9dybS3AerhXhrTfQ --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE parentId IS NULL) as top_level_cats,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE parentId IS NOT NULL) as sub_cats,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE categoryId IS NULL) as products_no_category,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE categoryId IS NOT NULL) as products_with_category,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products) as total_products;
